8

23. DigBala and KalaBala. Human Signs, quadruped Signs, Scorpio and watery Signs are,
respectively, strong in the directions commencing from the East. Further during night-time
quadruped Signs, day-time human, or biped Signs and the second half of Capricorn, Scorpio,
Cancer and Pisces are strong at the time of daybreak and of nightfall.
24. Gemini, Cancer, Capricorn Aries, Taurus and Sagittarius are night Signs. Leo, Libra, Scorpio,
Aquarius, Pisces and Virgo are day Signs. The Signs Cancer, Capricorn, Aries, Sagittarius
and Taurus are called Prishtodaya, which rise with hind part. Sirshodaya Signs (rising with
head) are Leo, Libra, Scorpio, Virgo, Aquarius and Gemini. The Sign Pisces is Ubhayodaya
(rises with both head and hind part).
25. Strength of Rasi.
